## Coverage notes

### 2026-06-12 — Pulse 2.0

**Capital Bank Appoints Don Busick To Board Leadership Team**

The headline and snippet are too thin to draw meaningful conclusions — there's no context explaining who Don Busick is, what role he's taking at Capital Bank, or how this connects to Koalafi (which is backed by Capital Bank).

Significance: low · Category: leadership

### 2026-06-10 — The Manila Times

**Capital Bank Announces the Appointment of Don Busick to Its Board Leadership Team**

The headline/snippet is too thin to draw meaningful conclusions — it references a "Capital Bank" board appointment for Don Busick, but provides no detail on how this connects to Koalafi, what role Busick will play, or what strategic implications follow. Without that context, no reliable read-through for Snap Finance can be made.

Significance: low · Category: leadership
